title: SearchInput
description: Search-optimised input: magnifier icon, automatic clear button, optional debounce and keyboard shortcut support.

basic.title: Basic usage
basic.desc: Magnifier icon and automatic ✕ button when there is a value.

debounce.title: With debounce
debounce.desc: Emits the search event after the specified delay. Useful for API calls.

shortcut.title: With shortcut
shortcut.desc: Shows a <kbd> hint on the right. The combination focuses the input globally.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: Three sizes aligned with the rest of the inputs.

loading.title: Loading
loading.desc: Shows a spinner instead of the clear button while searching.

props.label: Visible label above the input.
props.helperText: Helper text. Hidden when errorText is present.
props.errorText: Error message that marks the input as invalid.
props.color: Semantic color applied to the focus state.
props.radius: Corner radius. Inherits from ModoProvider when omitted.
props.loading: Shows a spinner instead of the clear button.
props.maxLength: Maximum length. Activates the counter if showCounter.
props.debounce: Delay (ms) before emitting 'search' while typing. 0 = only emits on Enter.
props.shortcut: Global keyboard shortcut that focuses the input. Shown as a <kbd> hint (e.g. 'cmd+k').
props.name: HTML name attribute.
props.ariaLabel: Accessible name when there is no visible label.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted on every value change (syncs v-model).
emits.focus: Emitted when the input receives focus.
emits.blur: Emitted when the input loses focus.
emits.clear: Emitted when the clear button is clicked.
emits.search: Emitted on Enter or after the debounce delay.
